things.name: Ship Breaking Yards (Sitakund)
things.description: World's largest ship breaking yards - giant tankers are dismantled by hand

things.name: Cox's Bazar Day Trip
things.description: World's longest natural sea beach at 120km - 2 hours from Chittagong

things.name: Ethnological Museum
things.description: Bangladesh's only ethnological museum with artefacts of 14 hill tribe communities

things.name: Chittagong War Cemetery
things.description: Commonwealth War Graves for WWII soldiers who died defending Burma

things.name: Boro Kuthi (DC Hill)
things.description: Portuguese colonial building on DC Hill park with botanical gardens

things.name: Chandanpura and Anderkilla Mosques
things.description: Portuguese-era mosques showing Chittagong's 500-year trading history

things.name: Patenga Sea Beach
things.description: Coastal beach and air force recreation area

things.name: Kaptai Lake
things.description: Largest artificial lake in Bangladesh in the Chittagong Hill Tracts with boat trips

things.name: Bandarban Hill District
things.description: Bangladesh's highest hills with Marma, Mro and Chakma tribal villages

things.name: Mezban Festival Food
things.description: Chittagong's famous community feast - spicy beef curry eaten with thousands of guests
